description: Public source records for every Stage-4 method assertion. Each scientific assertion in method/*.json cites a source_id here. Raw documents are NOT bundled in the repo (copyright + 'public data only, nothing bundled'). Each entry carries a public retrieval_url and a cache_filename — never a machine-local absolute path — plus raw_sha256, so any reviewer can re-fetch and re-verify the bytes for themselves with `python -m analysis.source_verify --cache-root DIR`.

sources.title: Evaluating “brain permeability”: A critical issue for the development of therapeutic agents for primary and metastatic brain tumors
sources.role: Authoritative source for the NEBPI Part I / Part II criteria. Supplied to Stage 4 by the orchestrator; hash independently re-verified on 2026-07-11.

sources.title: Moving beyond Rules: The Development of a Central Nervous System Multiparameter Optimization (CNS MPO) Approach To Enable Alignment of Druglike Properties
sources.retrieved_representation: JATS XML — METADATA + ABSTRACT ONLY (publisher-limited; contains no tables or transformation functions)
sources.role: Anchors only what the abstract states: six physicochemical parameters (ClogP, ClogD pH 7.4, MW, TPSA, HBD, most-basic pKa) and a desirability score on a 0–6 scale. It does NOT contain Table 1 or Table 2 and therefore cannot be used to encode the transformation functions.

sources.title: Moving beyond Rules: ... (CNS MPO) ... — PMC rendered full text
sources.license: ACS copyright; not redistributed. Only numeric parameters (facts) and short quotations are encoded.
sources.retrieved_representation: text/html (PMC-rendered full text, includes Table 1, Table 2 and Methods)
sources.volatility_note: A rendered HTML page. The byte hash pins exactly what THIS build read; NLM may re-render the page, so a future re-fetch may hash differently while the underlying article (DOI/PMCID) is immutable. The extracted numeric parameters are pinned separately in cns_mpo_wager2010_v1.json and are the reviewable unit.
sources.role: The document from which the CNS-MPO Table 1 transformation parameters and the Table 2 golden component/total scores were read. This is the ONLY retrieved representation of the article that contains them.
sources.supersedes_note: The orchestrator flagged PMC3368654.pdf and PMC3368654.bioc.xml in the references directory as HTML error/challenge responses, not source documents. Neither is cited here; neither is present in that directory as of access.

sources.title: DailyMed SPL v2 REST responses used ONLY to verify document structure and LOINC section codes
sources.role: Establishes the PARSER CONTRACT only (XML element paths, LOINC section codes, UNII active-moiety coding). NO drug-specific content from these probes is used as evidence anywhere in Stage 4, and none of it is bundled in the repo. Verified LOINC section codes (codeSystem 2.16.840.1.113883.6.1): 34066-1 Boxed Warning; 34070-3 Contraindications; 43685-7 Warnings and Precautions; 34073-7 Drug Interactions; 34084-4 Adverse Reactions.

sources.title: Central Nervous System Multiparameter Optimization Desirability: Application in Drug Discovery
sources.citation_verified_via: Crossref REST API (api.crossref.org/works/10.1021/acschemneuro.6b00029), accessed 2026-07-12: title, container, volume 7, issue 6, pages 767-775 confirmed. This verifies that the ARTICLE EXISTS. It verifies nothing about its contents.
sources.acquisition_blocked_by: pubs.acs.org returned HTTP 403 (Cloudflare); the DOI is not in PMC (idconv: 'Identifier not found in PMC'). The article bytes could not be retrieved, so no raw_sha256 is recorded — a hash of bytes never held would be a fiction.
sources.role: NOT a source of validation. No bytes of this article or its Table 2 were ever acquired or hashed, so nothing in Stage 4 is validated against it. The 3.7/2.7/90/375/1/9 -> 4.5 row attributed to it is carried in cns_mpo_wager2010_v1.json as `unverified_derived_regression_example`: an internal regression fixture, not a published golden, not primary-source validation, and not a cutoff of any kind.
sources.why_it_cannot_corroborate_itself: The row's values were copied from a prior audit report and are then pushed through the very Wager-2010 transforms they would be checking. Agreement therefore demonstrates only that this implementation is self-consistent. That is circular, and it is not independent validation.

cache_policy.no_absolute_paths: Source registry entries carry a cache_filename and a public retrieval_url, never a machine-local path. A committed absolute path is not reproducible on any other machine and is not a provenance record.
cache_policy.cache_root: Set SPOT_SOURCE_CACHE, or pass --cache-root, to point the verifier at a directory holding the cached bytes. Raw documents are NOT bundled in this repo (copyright; 'public data only, nothing bundled').
cache_policy.verifier: python -m analysis.source_verify [--cache-root DIR] -- re-hashes every cached document against raw_sha256 and reports acquired / not_acquired explicitly.
